headline: This Week In Digital Payment - Enhancing Nordic Bank Security Through CGI Entersekt Partnership
summary: CGI and Entersekt have partnered to enhance 3-D Secure (3DS) authentication services for issuing banks in the Nordics, aiming to strengthen fraud prevention while ensuring seamless customer experiences. This collaboration enables CGI in Norway to offer Entersekt’s cloud-based 3DS Access Control Server, implementing advanced authentication technologies such as biometrics and adaptive risk-based decisioning. Notably, Norion Bank in Sweden is the first to implement this solution as part of its...
